zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Stainton於1280年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德斯泰頓時，他的父親John De Stainton25歲，母親Margaret de Deighton20歲。他於1307年與Isabel DeHolland在英國英格蘭越可爾斯泰頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1330年在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Stainton于1280年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德斯泰頓时，他的父亲John De Stainton25岁，母亲Margaret de Deighton20岁。他于1307年与Isabel DeHolland在英国英格兰越可爾斯泰頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1330年在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stainton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and northern England): habitational name from any of various places called Stainton, including Stainton by Langworth, Market Stainton, and Stainton le Vale (all Lincolnshire), Stainton Dale (North Yorkshire), and Stainton (Cumberland, Durham, Lincolnshire, Lancashire, Westmorland, Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire). The placenames derive either from Old Norse steinn ‘stone, rock’ or from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’, later replaced by Old Norse steinn, + Old English tūn. The name was probably sometimes confused with or absorbed by Stanton .

variants.name: Stanton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England called Stanton or Staunton, especially Stanton in Staffordshire and Staunton in Worcestershire, all named with Old English stān ‘stone’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Most of the placenames come from their situation on stony ground, but in the case of Stanton Harcourt in Oxfordshire and Stanton Drew in Avon the reference is to the proximity of prehistoric stone monuments. The name has also sometimes been chosen by Ashkenazic Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames. This surname has also long been established in Ireland (especially Mayo).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Stainton was born in 1280, in Stainton, Westmorland, England, his father, John De Stainton, was 25 and his mother, Margaret de Deighton, was 20. He married Isabel DeHolland in 1307, in Stainton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1330, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Stainton est né en 1280, à Stainton, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, John De Stainton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Deighton, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Isabel DeHolland en 1307, à Stainton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1330, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Stainton 1280 in Stainton, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John De Stainton 25 und seine Mutter Margaret de Deighton 20. Er hat 1307 in Stainton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Isabel DeHolland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1330 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Stainton è nato il nel 1280 nel Stainton, Westmorland, England, il suo padre, John De Stainton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Deighton, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Isabel DeHolland nel 1307, nel Stainton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1330, nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Staintonが1280年にイギリスウエストモーランドスティイントンで生まれた時，父John De Staintonは25歳，母Margaret de Deightonは20歳であった。1307年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスティイントンでIsabel DeHollandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1330年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Stainton(이)가 1280년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 스테인턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John De Stainton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Deighton(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1307년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스테인턴에서 Isabel DeHolland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Stainton родился в 1280 г. в местности стеинтон, вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени John De Stainton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Deighton, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel DeHolland в 1307 г. в местности стеинтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1330 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.
